title: Quiz 2
description: Test your understanding of probability and uncertainty. This quiz covers conditional probability, Bayes' Rule, joint probability distributions, and more.
common_mistakes: Not using the law of total probability correctly

title: PageRank
description: Write a program to rank web pages by importance using the PageRank algorithm. Your program should model a corpus of web pages and their links, then compute a page rank for each page based on incoming links.
common_mistakes: Not handling pages with no outgoing links correctly
